title: pouteria costata
intro: Pouteria costata, also known as the white mangrove or white laurel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pouteria costata include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as the potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The herbal preparations of Pouteria costata can be made into decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk medicine in tropical regions.
